rows.label: qev085101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, you've come at a good time. Truth is,
I have a mission I want to ask of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yeah, when the Growth launched
an all-out attack on NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0004_2
rows.name:
There was a duo with a small,
Earthling-sized female type, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0005
rows.name: The duo called Dagahn and Ryyz, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Fact is, we got a report that they
were spotted in Yakou no Mori.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0009
rows.name:
I wonder if they're
planning to invade again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0010
rows.name:
That possibility is high, and
even if not, they're definitely
plotting something no good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0011
rows.name:
That's right mo! Tatsu and the others
will go investigate right away mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085101_MSG0012_2
rows.name:
Since we've fought them once before,
we are the most suited to go.[ST:wait ]
